re_viewer0.23.2

In re_viewer::external::arrow::datatypes

re_viewer::external::arrow::datatypes

Function validate_decimal_precision_and_scale

pub fn validate_decimal_precision_and_scale<T>(
    precision: u8,
    scale: i8,
) -> Result<(), ArrowError>
where
    T: DecimalType,
Expand description

Validate that precision and scale are valid for T

Returns an Error if:

  • precision is zero
  • precision is larger than T:MAX_PRECISION
  • scale is larger than T::MAX_SCALE
  • scale is > precision
